scripts.dev: PAGES_BASE_PATH=/ SITE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173/ node scripts/generate-site.mjs && PAGES_BASE_PATH=/ SITE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173/ vite
scripts.build: npm run generate:site && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.build:root-test: PAGES_BASE_PATH=/ SITE_URL=https://moyeoplay.example/ CUSTOM_DOMAIN=moyeoplay.example BUILD_OUT_DIR=dist-root-test ADSENSE_ENABLED=true ADSENSE_TEST_MODE=true ADSENSE_CLIENT_ID=ca-pub-1234567890123456 ADSENSE_PUBLISHER_ID=pub-1234567890123456 ADSENSE_CONTENT_SLOT_ID=1234567890 npm run build
scripts.test:e2e:prod: npm run build:pages && npm run test:e2e:prod:run
scripts.test:e2e:root: npm run build:root-test && PAGES_BASE_PATH=/ SITE_URL=https://moyeoplay.example/ CUSTOM_DOMAIN=moyeoplay.example BUILD_OUT_DIR=dist-root-test ADSENSE_ENABLED=true ADSENSE_TEST_MODE=true ADSENSE_CLIENT_ID=ca-pub-1234567890123456 ADSENSE_PUBLISHER_ID=pub-1234567890123456 ADSENSE_CONTENT_SLOT_ID=1234567890 E2E_MODE=prod E2E_BASE_PATH=/ playwright test tests/e2e/seo.spec.ts tests/e2e/adsense.spec.ts
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
